channel.title: Indian on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Indian on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: Brass Tabletop Reference
item.description: Good for saving brass details and object styling ideas.

item.title: Courtyard Room Designer
item.description: Add designer credit, project name, photographer, and source link later.

item.title: Hey House
item.description: Add notes about favorite pieces, price range, shipping, and anything worth remembering.

item.title: Indian Art Source
item.description: Add favorite pieces, source links, artist notes, and price range here.

item.title: Indian Lighting Source
item.description: Add favorite fixtures, bulb notes, dimensions, and source links here.

item.title: People / Artist / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian artists and makers whose work can influence rooms, color, textiles, or objects.

item.title: People / Interior Designer / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian designers, studios, and rooms worth studying.

item.title: Stores / Furniture / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian furniture sources and makers, especially wood pieces, carved details, cane, storage, and dining furniture.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Art / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian art sources, wall pieces, sculptural objects, paintings, prints, and handmade artworks.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Home / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian home object sources and room-finishing details.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Lighting / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian lighting stores and handmade fixture references.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Textile / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian textile sources, rugs, cushions, wall textiles, fabric artwork, and pattern-based pieces.
